title: Here Are Our Predictions in 12 Key 2026 Grammy Races, Including All 6 General Field Categories
text: The Record of the Year category features three presumed frontrunners competing in what appears to be an exceptionally tight race. The leading candidates are: Lady Gaga's "Abracadabra", Kendrick Lamar featuring SZA's "Luther", ROSÉ & Bruno Mars' "APT.". According to the analysis, "Luther" is predicted to win this category. The track demonstrates distinctive qualities, with the article noting it "moves at a leisurely pace and even has a cinematic quality," contrasting sharply with the "turbo-charged pop" style of "APT.". A victory for either "APT." or "Luther" would mark "the first male/female collab to win in this category since the Gotye/Kimbra smash 'Somebody That I Used to Know' 13 years ago." If "APT." wins, Bruno Mars would achieve unprecedented success, becoming the first artist to claim four Record of the Year awards in the category's history. Additionally, ROSÉ would make history as the first K-pop artist to win in a Big Four Grammy category.
